nasb.text: And Jesus said to him, “ ‘If You can?’ All things are possible to him who believes.”

esv.text: And Jesus said to him, “‘If you can’! All things are possible for one who believes.”

cnv.text: 耶穌對他說：“‘如果你能’—對於信的人，甚麼都能！”

ccb.text: 耶稣说：“如果你能？对于相信的人，凡事都有可能！”

csbs.text: 耶稣对他说：“‘如果你能’？——对信的人，一切都能。”
